name: AI chat query answers a question about the analyzed project
description: After signing in and calculating metrics, the user asks the AI chat a question about their churn data and receives a written assistant response in the conversation.

planSteps.description: Click the 'Sign in' button (or 'Get started') to open the sign-in dialog
Type a valid email address (for example demo@churnsense.app) into the sign-in email field in the dialog
Click the button that enters the dashboard
Type a project name such as 'Beta Client A' into the Project name field
Type 1000 into the Total users field, 850 into Active users, 150 into Churned users, and 5000 into Monthly revenue
Scroll down to the AI chat section at the bottom of the dashboard
Type the question 'What is my churn rate and how can I improve retention?' into the AI chat message input
Click the Send button in the chat
Verify a new assistant response message appears in the chat conversation area (a non-empty reply bubble from the assistant)
